'''dahuzhu''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:aven|aven]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''child''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| d-h-zh
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:aven|aven]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| child
|-
! Citation form
| dahuzhu
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:dæhizhith|dæhizhith]] || [[word:dæhizhij|dæhizhij]] || [[word:dæhizhish|dæhizhish]] || [[word:dæhizhi|dæhizhi]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:dahuhuzhuth|dahuhuzhuth]] || [[word:dahuhuzhuj|dahuhuzhuj]] || [[word:dahuhuzhush|dahuhuzhush]] || [[word:dahuhuzhu|dahuhuzhu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:dahuzhuth|dahuzhuth]] || [[word:dahuzhuj|dahuzhuj]] || [[word:dahuzhush|dahuzhush]] || [[word:dahuzhu|dahuzhu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:dahufzhuth|dahufzhuth]] || [[word:dahufzhuj|dahufzhuj]] || [[word:dahufzhush|dahufzhush]] || [[word:dahufzhuf|dahufzhuf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for child singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:dahuzhuthu|dahuzhuthu]] || [[word:dahuzhuju|dahuzhuju]] || [[word:dahuzhushu|dahuzhushu]] || [[word:dahuzhuku|dahuzhuku]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:dahuzhuth|dahuzhuth]] || [[word:dahuzhuj|dahuzhuj]] || [[word:dahuzhush|dahuzhush]] || [[word:dahuzhu|dahuzhu]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:dahuzhuthul|dahuzhuthul]] || [[word:dahuzhujul|dahuzhujul]] || [[word:dahuzhushul|dahuzhushul]] || [[word:dahuzhukul|dahuzhukul]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:dahuzhuthuthu|dahuzhuthuthu]] || [[word:dahuzhujuju|dahuzhujuju]] || [[word:dahuzhushushu|dahuzhushushu]] || [[word:dahuzhuku|dahuzhuku]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:dahuzhuthun|dahuzhuthun]] || [[word:dahuzhujun|dahuzhujun]] || [[word:dahuzhushun|dahuzhushun]] || [[word:dahuzhukun|dahuzhukun]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:dahuzhuthuoro|dahuzhuthuoro]] || [[word:dahuzhujuoro|dahuzhujuoro]] || [[word:dahuzhushuoro|dahuzhushuoro]] || [[word:dahuzhukuoro|dahuzhukuoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|718161e}}
